name: Impossible Ham & Broccoli Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Full cooked center slice ham (lean)
1 tbsp Chopped dried onion or 3 tbsp Fresh chopped onion
2 cups Skim or non-fat milk, minus 2 tbsp.
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the ham and onion. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Layer the cottage cheese and Parmesan on the bottom of a 13 x 9 pan.
3. Add the broccoli, ham, onion, salt, and pepper over the cottage cheese layer.
4. Sprinkle half the grated cheese evenly over the top.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, baking mix, and eggs until combined.
6. Pour the mixture over the layered ingredients in the pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
